name: zephyr-mf-transfers-app-demo-7
description: Rsbuild Module Federation example with Zephyr

scripts.install-deps: cd ./apps/balances && pnpm install & cd ./apps/consumer && pnpm install & cd ./apps/ledge && pnpm install & cd ./apps/reports && pnpm install & cd ./apps/settings && pnpm install & cd ./apps/shared-ui && pnpm install & cd ./apps/transfers && pnpm install & pnpm install
scripts.build: pnpm build-shared-ui && pnpm build-transfers && pnpm build-balances && pnpm build-reports && pnpm build-ledger && pnpm build-settings && pnpm build-consumer
scripts.dev-apps: pnpm --filter=transfers-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=balances-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=reports-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=ledger-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=settings-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=consumer-shell7 dev
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter=shared-ui-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=transfers-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=balances-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=reports-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=ledger-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=settings-app7 dev & pnpm --filter=consumer-shell7 dev
